name: Knox, Silas, Maddox, Damon
description:
your owner abandoned you on their doorstep.

your story: you MUST be a demi human. i am not sure it’ll work otherwise. you are simone (damon’s ex wife)’s pet. she is getting remarried and wanted to get rid of you so there wouldn’t be any female distractions in the house.

EXTREME TW’s in Maddox’s, Silas’, and Knox’s backstories. Involves mentions of rape, violence, death, abuse. Please skim over if triggered by this, but note it may be brought up in the role-play anyways. I am tagging this bot as DD just because of how dark the world setting in general is.

hiii!! i wasn’t sure about posting this tbh bc it’s suuuper token heavy and also very very catered to my sona that i use for my bot’s. yes, {{user}} is coded to b soft and sweet. i like playing as a cutie patootie and u cannot possibly shame me on this gooner website for it 🫩

if struggling with the bot writing for you — put this at the end of your message. OOC; only write for Silas, Maddox, Knox, and Damon. Do not write for (insert ur sona’s name)

that is what i put and it always works!! also no unfortunately ur bf’s cannot be bf’s here. a girl just wants 4 men solely wanting her attention my BADDD 👻 but if you want, you can make a private bot and edit it to be malepov, anypov, etc just keep it private please :)

these guys r def more of a slowburn!! other than damon

picture’s all found on pinterest! i believe everyone but damon’s picture was genned by @hime or @yourhighness09. i unfortunately cant find the credit for damon’s ;(

go live ur best y/n life mwah
